exploration_notes: The xDS configuration delivery chain has three layers: (1) Proto definitions in data-plane-api define the wire protocol — DiscoveryRequest/DiscoveryResponse messages in discovery.proto and the AggregatedDiscoveryService with StreamAggregatedResources/DeltaAggregatedResources RPCs in ads.proto. (2) go-control-plane implements the server side — discovery.pb.go has the generated Go types for DiscoveryRequest/DiscoveryResponse, ads_grpc.pb.go has the generated gRPC service interface, pkg/server/v3/s
